description: PRED-073 (SAA Western Cell Drift ≥0.3° Westward by May 2026) discovered on dome predictions page but NOT IN our predictions.json catalog. Test window closes end-of-May 2026 (~8 days from poll date). Dome still showing status PENDING — PROSPECTIVE. This is an imminent window (Step 10b) that was missed by the automated scan because the entry is absent from our catalog. Prediction registered 2026-04-04 (April 4 batch). Claim: ECM predicts SAA western cell drifts ≥0.3° further westward April→May 2026, consistent with toroidal aetheric return flow carrying bottom-plate flux concentration westward along Sump channel. Falsification rule: SAA western cell drifts <0.1° westward or reverses direction. Source: CHAOS-7 / NOAA NGDC monthly geomagnetic field maps. SHA256: 291f26977092d846368b094eea66118d46d83a055d9a596d01fb8b7f78c824e5. Data for May 2026 (CHAOS-7 monthly) typically available early June — so dome has ~8 days to post a result before the window becomes technically closed. If no result by June 5, this becomes a silent-ignore-in-progress candidate. ACTION REQUIRED: analyst should (1) add PRED-073 to predictions.json with category=geomagnetic, prospective=true, our_verdict=pending, test_window_closes=2026-05-31; (2) monitor dome for result post before end of month.
after: PRED-073 on dome site as PENDING — PROSPECTIVE, test window May 2026 (closes ~2026-05-31), uncatalogued
git_commit: Not a site change — poller discovery of gap between dome site and our catalog
